translation_notes: Bullish engulfing: current candle body larger than previous body, close higher than previous close, and open lower than previous close (prior candle was black/down). Bearish engulfing: current candle body larger than previous body, close lower than previous close, and open higher than previous close (prior candle was white/up). Exit conditions inferred as reversal crossovers of previous close since AUTHOR_SILENT. Used bar properties (body, close, open) with prev_ references to detect 2-candle sequence patterns.
